description.ko: 완벽한 흑요석 큐브가 디지털 글리치 소용돌이로 산산조각 나는 수학적 혼돈에 대한 연구입니다.
description.en: A study of mathematical chaos where a perfect obsidian cube shatters into a digital glitch vortex.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian tesseract by KURO-X, titled 'Fragmented Vector Singularity.' The structure undergoes a high-velocity mathematical deconstruction, shattering into a calculated vortex of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards. Set against a clinical #FFFFFF digital void, the composition features intentional pixel-sorting artifacts, heavy digital scanlines, and extreme RGB chromatic aberration. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the precise moment of chaotic order within a glitch-art framework.
